label: Video Hero
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for a hero section with an autoplay-muted-loop background video, a poster image fallback for visitors with reduced-data or reduced-motion preferences, and a foreground headline + CTA overlay. Server-rendered HTML with a single <video> element using preload='metadata' and a native poster — no JS library, no YouTube embed (which would ship a 600KB tracker). Hard alternatives (mux-player-react, vimeo-player) are planned imports for sites that need adaptive bitrate or analytics.
